creator: onatan@gmail.com
text:
Update to 2.7. msfupdate is now replaced by subversion. set that as a
dependancy and fix msfupdate to enlighten users.
Lots and lots of .svn changes in the plist.

Fix: Sponsored by Afarsec.
How-To-Repeat: Eye your 1eetness meter. It has been dropping steadily, meaning it is time for
new 1eet 'sploits, or you'll become one of those "when-I-was-your-age" hackers.
